title: Add negative compile-fail coverage for Meshtastic payload limit drift
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-t2hn.7.3 adds a BUILD_ASSERT tying CONFIG_LICHEN_APP_INTERFACE_MAX_PAYLOAD to LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_TEXT_PAYLOAD_MAX in the gateway Meshtastic adapter, but current validation only covers successful matching builds. What needs to be done: add a no-hardware compile-fail/Twister fixture or equivalent CI check that intentionally sets CONFIG_LICHEN_APP_INTERFACE_MAX_PAYLOAD away from LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_TEXT_PAYLOAD_MAX for the Meshtastic gateway adapter test surface and asserts the build fails at the guard. Keep the positive native_sim gateway adapter build intact.
notes:
Implemented no-hardware negative compile-fail coverage on 2026-07-03.

Code/docs/scripts changed:
- lichen/apps/gateway/src/meshtastic_adapter.c: added explicit BUILD_ASSERT diagnostic for CONFIG_LICHEN_APP_INTERFACE_MAX_PAYLOAD == LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_TEXT_PAYLOAD_MAX.
- scripts/zephyr-meshtastic-negative-builds.sh: new executable helper that builds lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter with CONFIG_LICHEN_APP_INTERFACE_MAX_PAYLOAD=199 and asserts the guard diagnostic appears.
- .github/workflows/ci.yml: zephyr-native-sim now runs scripts/zephyr-meshtastic-negative-builds.sh after the Meshtastic codec native_sim test.

Local checks:
- chmod +x scripts/zephyr-meshtastic-negative-builds.sh
- git diff --check: pass.
- bash -n scripts/zephyr-meshtastic-negative-builds.sh: pass.

EC2 validation using prepared EBS Zephyr builder:
- Existing primary worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN was dirty and behind origin/main, so preserved it and used clean detached worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn-7-3-1 from origin/main at 51ec3eca with only this patch applied.
- Command: west twister -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-t2hn-7-3-1 --extra-args=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen
  Result: 2 scenarios / 4 instances selected; 2/4 passed, 2 static skips, 0 failed, 0 errored, 0 warnings in 66.14s; 162 test cases executed. Twister warning only: pkg_resources deprecated in Zephyr twister environment.
- Command: OUT_DIR=$PWD/build/meshtastic-negative scripts/zephyr-meshtastic-negative-builds.sh
  Result: PASS app-interface-payload-drift; Meshtastic negative build checks passed.

Exploration:
- Galileo confirmed lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter compiles meshtastic_adapter.c and CONFIG_LICHEN_APP_INTERFACE_MAX_PAYLOAD=199 should hit the intended guard; qemu_x86 is the smallest non-Bluetooth compile surface.
- Wegener recommended a separate Meshtastic negative helper rather than extending scripts/zephyr-hal-negative-builds.sh; noted CI command should be scripts/zephyr-meshtastic-negative-builds.sh, which was fixed before validation.

Code reviews:
- Raman: no findings; residual risk was executable Zephyr validation, satisfied by EC2 commands above.
- Sagan: clean; verified negative helper targets intended BUILD_ASSERT, CI path is staged script path, positive defaults remain 200.
- Kuhn: no P0/P1/P2 findings; P3 observation that failure path prints only log path, not log tail. Left as acceptable and consistent with existing HAL helper style.
close_reason: Completed no-hardware scope: added Meshtastic payload drift negative build helper, CI hook, explicit BUILD_ASSERT diagnostic, EC2 positive/negative validation, and three independent code reviews.
